claims.quote:
The Marie-Josée Kravis Fellowship in Quantitative Biology
Postdoctoral fellowship for quantitative biologists focusing on high-risk, high-impact cancer research.
claims.claimText: Marie-Josée Kravis Fellowship — postdoctoral fellowship in quantitative biology cancer research.
claims.limitations: Postdoctoral PhD-level fellowship — not a clinical USCE pathway.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Named postdoctoral research fellowship — Tier 3 post-trainee research career support.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured the general postdoctoral training program but missed the specific named Kravis Fellowship in Quantitative Biology.
